---
listing:
  contents: "20blog/*.qmd"
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: false
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui:
    - title
    - subtitle
  image-placeholder: img/image-placeholder.png
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true

format:
  html:
    theme:
      - iframe_match.scss
    css: _entry_dark_vars.css
    include-in-header: preprocessing.html
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* 0,3,0 specificity beats Chakra .quarto-listing .card * (0,2,0) */
.quarto-listing .card .listing-title,
.quarto-listing .card .listing-subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-heading) !important;
}
</style>
```
